description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow enclosed within a rectangular boundary wall, featuring a flat roof with green spaces and several trees integrated into the design. The property includes a wooden deck area with a hot tub, a swimming pool surrounded by a lawn, and a circular above-ground water tank. The main building is constructed with light-colored materials and has multiple large windows and doors, providing ample natural light. The outdoor spaces are landscaped with a mix of grass, paved walkways, and decorative plants, while the entrance is marked by a prominent gate. Additional features include a small pergola, a driveway, and various outdoor seating areas, making the bungalow suitable for comfortable urban living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped gardens, a pool, and multiple outdoor living areas within a walled property.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance gate, the wooden deck with a hot tub, and the front lawn with trees and a pool.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear side with the circular water tank, green roof areas, and a row of trees along the back boundary.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side with the pergola, pool, and additional garden features, as well as the hot tub area.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the driveway, a secondary entrance, and the arrangement of windows and outdoor seating along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
